Opt-in Pages and Launch Funnels
• Leadpages
• We’ve used Leadpages to create our funnel and
launches
• Great for opt-in pages, sales pages, webinar pages,
webcast pages, thank you pages, etc.
• Disclaimer: Run by Clay Collins - a long-time friend
Opt-in Pages and Launch Funnels
• Leadpages
• Tested designs that integrate with Wordpress,
Facebook, standalone pages - or they’ll host the
page for you
• http://productlaunchformula.com/leadpages
Opt-in Pages and Launch Funnels
• Kajabi
• We used Kajabi for many years
• Built in launch funnels and opt-in pages
• Amazing for online video courses
• http://productlaunchformula.com/kajabibp
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Opt-in Pages and Launch Funnels
• OptimizePress

Opt-in Pages and Launch Funnels
• Clickfunnels
• I’ve been impressed with the Clickfunnels team and
the community.
• We use Clickfunnels for our book funnel (“Launch”)
• http://www.productlaunchformula.com/clickfunnels
Opt-in Pages and Launch Funnels
• Wordpress
• Great free software for building sites - great
place to start
• The PLF Portal is uses a customized Wordpress
theme (Memberium -
http://productlaunchformula.com/memberium )
• Leadpages (and many other tools) build pages
that integrate into Wordpress
• http://productlaunchformula.com/wordpress
